# ScreenshotsMCP

> Give your AI coding assistant eyes. Screenshot any URL, automate browsers, audit performance and SEO — all via MCP tools.

ScreenshotsMCP is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that gives AI coding assistants the ability to see and interact with websites. It works with Claude, Cursor, Windsurf, VS Code, and any MCP-compatible client.

## Quick Start

1. Get an API key at https://screenshotsmcp.com/dashboard/keys
2. Add to your MCP config:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "screenshotsmcp": {
      "url": "https://screenshotsmcp-api-production.up.railway.app/mcp/YOUR_API_KEY"
    }
  }
}
```

3. Ask your AI: "Take a screenshot of https://example.com"

## Server URL

MCP endpoint: `https://screenshotsmcp-api-production.up.railway.app/mcp/YOUR_API_KEY`
REST API base: `https://screenshotsmcp-api-production.up.railway.app`
Transport: Streamable HTTP

## Authentication

Every request requires an API key. Keys start with `sk_live_`.

- MCP: API key is embedded in the server URL path
- REST API: Pass as `Authorization: Bearer sk_live_...` header

Rate limits by plan:
- Free: 100 screenshots/month
- Starter: 2,000 screenshots/month
- Pro: 10,000 screenshots/month

---

## Tools Reference (28 tools)

### take_screenshot
Capture a screenshot of any URL and return a public image URL.

Parameters:
- url (string, required): The URL to screenshot
- width (number, default: 1280): Viewport width in pixels (320–3840)
- height (number, default: 800): Viewport height in pixels (240–2160)
- fullPage (boolean, default: false): Capture full scrollable page
- format (string, default: "png"): png, jpeg, or webp
- delay (number, default: 0): Wait ms after page load (0–10000)

Notes: Screenshots stored on Cloudflare R2 CDN. Pages rendered with real Chromium + stealth mode. Supports SPAs.

### screenshot_fullpage
Capture a full-page screenshot (entire scrollable content) of any URL.

Parameters:
- url (string, required): The URL to screenshot
- width (number, default: 1280): Viewport width in pixels (320–3840)
- format (string, default: "png"): png, jpeg, or webp

Notes: Scrolls entire page. Max resolution 8192px.

### screenshot_mobile
Capture a screenshot at iPhone 14 Pro viewport (393x852).

Parameters:
- url (string, required): The URL to screenshot
- fullPage (boolean, default: false): Capture full scrollable page
- format (string, default: "png"): png, jpeg, or webp

### screenshot_tablet
Capture a screenshot at iPad viewport (820x1180).

Parameters:
- url (string, required): The URL to screenshot
- fullPage (boolean, default: false): Capture full scrollable page
- format (string, default: "png"): png, jpeg, or webp

### screenshot_responsive
Capture screenshots at desktop (1280x800), tablet (820x1180), and mobile (393x852) in one call.

Parameters:
- url (string, required): The URL to screenshot
- fullPage (boolean, default: false): Capture full scrollable page
- format (string, default: "png"): png, jpeg, or webp

Returns three screenshot URLs in a single call. Most efficient for responsive testing.

### screenshot_dark
Capture a screenshot with dark mode (prefers-color-scheme: dark) emulated.

Parameters:
- url (string, required): The URL to screenshot
- width (number, default: 1280): Viewport width (320–3840)
- height (number, default: 800): Viewport height (240–2160)
- fullPage (boolean, default: false): Capture full scrollable page
- format (string, default: "png"): png, jpeg, or webp

### screenshot_element
Capture a screenshot of a specific element on the page by CSS selector.

Parameters:
- url (string, required): The URL to screenshot
- selector (string, required): CSS selector of the element to capture
- format (string, default: "png"): png, jpeg, or webp

### screenshot_pdf
Export a webpage as a PDF document (A4 format with background graphics).

Parameters:
- url (string, required): The URL to export as PDF

### get_screenshot_status
Check the status of a screenshot job by ID.

Parameters:
- id (string, required): The screenshot job ID

Returns: status (pending, processing, done, failed) and public URL when ready.

### list_recent_screenshots
List the most recent screenshots taken with your API key.

Parameters:
- limit (number, default: 5): Number of screenshots to return (1–20)

---

### browser_navigate
Open a browser and navigate to a URL. Returns a screenshot and session ID.

Parameters:
- url (string, required): URL to navigate to
- sessionId (string, optional): Reuse an existing session

Sessions persist for 5 minutes of inactivity. Max 6 concurrent sessions. Always call browser_close when done.

### browser_click
Click an element by CSS selector or visible text.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate
- selector (string, required): CSS selector or visible text (e.g. "Sign in")

### browser_fill
Type text into an input field. Clears field first.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate
- selector (string, required): CSS selector for the input field
- value (string, required): Text to type

### browser_hover
Hover over an element to trigger hover states, tooltips, or dropdowns.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate
- selector (string, required): CSS selector of element to hover

### browser_select_option
Select an option from a dropdown select element.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate
- selector (string, required): CSS selector for the select element
- value (string, required): Value or visible text of the option

### browser_press_key
Simulate keyboard key presses.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate
- key (string, required): Key to press (Enter, Tab, Escape, ArrowDown, Control+a, etc.)

Supports modifiers: Control+key, Shift+key, Alt+key, Meta+key.

### browser_scroll
Scroll the page by pixel amount.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate
- x (number, default: 0): Horizontal scroll pixels
- y (number, default: 500): Vertical scroll pixels (positive = down)

### browser_wait_for
Wait for an element to appear, then return a screenshot.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate
- selector (string, required): CSS selector to wait for
- timeout (number, default: 5000): Max wait time in ms (500–15000)

### browser_go_back
Navigate back in browser history.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate

### browser_go_forward
Navigate forward in browser history.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate

### browser_close
Close the browser session and free resources. Always call when done.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID to close

---

### browser_screenshot
Take a screenshot of the current page without performing any action.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate

### browser_get_text
Extract all visible text from the page or a specific element.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate
- selector (string, optional): CSS selector. Omit for entire page.

### browser_get_html
Get the HTML source of the page or a specific element.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate
- selector (string, optional): CSS selector. Omit for full page.

### browser_get_accessibility_tree
Get the accessibility tree for a11y analysis.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate

Returns: structured tree with role, name, level, and state for each element.

### browser_evaluate
Run JavaScript in the browser and return the result.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate
- script (string, required): JavaScript expression to evaluate

Has full DOM access: window, document, localStorage, etc.

---

### browser_perf_metrics
Get Core Web Vitals and performance metrics.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate

Returns: TTFB, FCP, LCP, CLS, DOM load time, full load time, DOM node count, resource count, transfer size, and resource breakdown by type.

Good thresholds: TTFB < 800ms, FCP < 1.8s, LCP < 2.5s, CLS < 0.1.

### browser_network_requests
Get the full network request waterfall.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate
- resourceType (string, optional): Filter: script, stylesheet, image, font, fetch, xhr
- minDuration (number, default: 0): Only requests slower than this (ms)
- limit (number, default: 50): Max requests to return

Returns per request: status code, method, duration, transfer size, resource type, URL.

---

### browser_seo_audit
Run a comprehensive SEO audit.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate

Returns: title, meta description, canonical URL, robots, viewport, Open Graph tags, Twitter Card tags, heading hierarchy (h1–h6), image alt text coverage, internal/external link counts, JSON-LD structured data.

### browser_console_logs
Get console messages (errors, warnings, logs) from the session.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate

Returns: all console.log, console.warn, console.error, and unhandled exceptions since session start.

### browser_network_errors
Get all failed network requests (4xx, 5xx, timeouts).

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate

Returns: status code, URL, and error type for each failed request.

### browser_cookies
Get, set, or clear cookies.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate
- action (string, required): get, set, or clear
- name (string, optional): Cookie name (for set)
- value (string, optional): Cookie value (for set)
- domain (string, optional): Cookie domain (for set)
- path (string, default: "/"): Cookie path (for set)

### browser_storage
Read and write localStorage and sessionStorage.

Parameters:
- sessionId (string, required): Session ID from browser_navigate
- storageType (string, required): local or session
- action (string, required): get, set, remove, or clear
- key (string, optional): Storage key (for get, set, remove)
- value (string, optional): Value (for set)

---

## REST API

Base URL: https://screenshotsmcp-api-production.up.railway.app

### POST /v1/screenshot

Enqueue a screenshot job.

Headers:
- Authorization: Bearer sk_live_...
- Content-Type: application/json

Request body:
- url (string, required): URL to screenshot
- width (number, default: 1280): Viewport width
- height (number, default: 800): Viewport height
- fullPage (boolean, default: false): Capture full page
- format (string, default: "png"): png, jpeg, or webp
- delay (number, default: 0): Wait ms after load

Response:
```json
{ "id": "abc123", "status": "pending" }
```

### GET /v1/screenshot/:id

Poll for screenshot status.

Headers:
- Authorization: Bearer sk_live_...

Response:
```json
{ "id": "abc123", "status": "done", "url": "https://...", "error": null, "createdAt": "2025-01-01T00:00:00.000Z" }
```

Status values: pending, processing, done, failed.

---

## Installation by Client

### Cursor
~/.cursor/mcp.json:
```json
{ "mcpServers": { "screenshotsmcp": { "url": "https://screenshotsmcp-api-production.up.railway.app/mcp/YOUR_API_KEY" } } }
```

### Windsurf
```json
{ "mcpServers": { "screenshotsmcp": { "serverUrl": "https://screenshotsmcp-api-production.up.railway.app/mcp/YOUR_API_KEY" } } }
```

### Claude Desktop
claude_desktop_config.json:
```json
{ "mcpServers": { "screenshotsmcp": { "url": "https://screenshotsmcp-api-production.up.railway.app/mcp/YOUR_API_KEY" } } }
```

### VS Code (Copilot)
.vscode/mcp.json:
```json
{ "mcpServers": { "screenshotsmcp": { "url": "https://screenshotsmcp-api-production.up.railway.app/mcp/YOUR_API_KEY" } } }
```

---

## Documentation

Full docs: https://screenshotsmcp.com/docs
